parsed_review.summary: CP00-906 is a descriptor-only RP30 embedded-HRX bridge pack (production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false) spanning RP30.P02.M00.S09-RP30.P02.M01.S05 (10 units, risk A: 5 RuleEngine tail + 5 LeaveWorkflow slices). The production_ready=false / descriptor-verified claim is fully supported. registry.js (HRX_CP906 binding, requirements, required-section-rows, createHrxDomainRows, createHrxCp906RuleEngineLeaveWorkflowBridgeDescriptor) sets every runtime/write/real-data flag to false and deep-freezes all output; validators.js (validateHrxCp906...Coverage / ...Descriptor / validateHrxPeopleContract) enforces descriptor type, source chain, program/authority boundaries, and rule-engine + leave-workflow no-runtime/no-write/no-real-data/no-secret gates with non-vacuous checks; model.test.js asserts these (errors==[]) and re-validates the committed contract JSON, whose latest_projection matches (HrxCp906RuleEngineLeaveWorkflowBridgeDescriptor, authority_boundary correct, runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-907). No fs/network/child_process/process.env/secret access exists in packages/hrx/src — genuinely no runtime or I/O. Authority boundary intact: Claude is read-only and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, c30_read_only:true, human_final_approval_required:true); Hermes is used only as a deterministic review/evidence packet (emits_runtime_receipt:false), not product runtime. Pack binding matches the live closeout-pack-plan (deviation_from_plan:false) and all 10 units plus next unit S06 exist in the weighted-implementation-ledger source of truth. CP178+ hardening checks pass: auth preflight succeeded with valid non-empty JSON (no auth failure, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, or missing fields). One non-blocking P3: the full pre-commit validation ladder and the PENDING evidence files (claude-review-result/construction-inspection/adjudication) remain to be finalized by the deterministic commit step, which is outside the read-only reviewer scope; the HRX-specific local validations already recorded pass with exit 0. Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS — does not block pack or this-CP goal closeout.

findings.title: Full closeout validation ladder and evidence-file finalization pending the deterministic commit step (outside read-only scope)
findings.details: command-evidence.json is status "pending" / gate_outcome "pending_pack_evidence_creation" and records only the 6 initial HRX-specific validations (node --check, node --test, rp30:hrx:validate, rp30:validate, hrx:requirements:validate, hrx:weighted:validate), all exit_code 0. The broader closeout ladder expected before closeout (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) is not yet captured as evidence, and claude-review-result.json / construction-inspection.json / adjudication.md are still PENDING placeholders. This is the expected pre-commit state — the evidence note explicitly states the full ladder must be re-run before commit, and these files are the targets this very review populates. As a read-only reviewer I cannot execute the ladder, so this is reported for provenance transparency, not as a code or boundary defect.
findings.recommendation: During the deterministic commit step, run the full validation ladder and git diff --check, normalize the hardened review receipt, and finalize adjudication/construction-inspection so the recorded evidence matches the closeout requirement before committing CP00-906. No implementation change required.
